Interface Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchRest5ClientConfigurationCallback

All Superinterfaces:
ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback<co.elastic.clients.transport.rest5_client.low_level.Rest5ClientBuilder>
Enclosing class:
Rest5Clients
public static interface Rest5Clients.ElasticsearchRest5ClientConfigurationCallback extends ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback<co.elastic.clients.transport.rest5_client.low_level.Rest5ClientBuilder>
ClientConfiguration.ClientConfigurationCallback to configure the Rest5Client client with a Rest5ClientBuilder
Since:
6.0
